name: RRResponsibleAgencyOrganization
title: RR Responsible Agency Organization
description: This Organization profile represents the Responsible Agency which is a PHA to which reporting is legally required.

mapping.name: RR Responsible Agency Organization mapping to CDA
mapping.comment: This table maps RR Responsible Agency Organization profile to CDA

element.definition: The Responsible Agency profile is based on the eCR Organization profile and sets the type to 'Responsible Agency'. A Responsible Agency is a PHA to which reporting is legally required. This represents the PHA for the location in which care was provided and/or where the patient lives.
